tasks.label: build OpenGL project
tasks.command: mkdir -p DX_studies_2025/build && clang++ DX_studies_2025/DX_studies_2025/*.cpp common_functions/*.cpp -std=c++17 -DGL_SILENCE_DEPRECATION -Icommon_functions -I. -I/opt/homebrew/opt/opencv/include/opencv4 -I/opt/X11/include -L/opt/homebrew/opt/opencv/lib -L/opt/X11/lib -lopencv_core -lopencv_imgproc -lopencv_highgui -lopencv_videoio -lopencv_imgcodecs -lopencv_calib3d -lopencv_features2d -framework OpenGL -framework GLUT -o DX_studies_2025/build/OpenGLApp
